description_long: This figure depicts a humanoid adult with a cybernetic or armored appearance, featuring a bald head and a robust, segmented exoskeleton covering the torso, arms, and legs. The armor is detailed with mechanical joints, reinforced plating, and visible bolts, giving a futuristic, tactical impression. The individual wears a utility belt with pouches and has additional armor elements on the shoulders and knees, suggesting enhanced protection. Notably, a large, angular, cape-like structure with metallic wings and a helmeted headpiece is suspended above the figure, possibly as a decorative or symbolic accessory. The overall design blends human anatomy with advanced robotics, emphasizing strength and resilience. The posture is upright and alert, with arms slightly bent and feet shoulder-width apart.
description: A cybernetic adult figure in segmented armor with a bald head, utility belt, and a large, winged cape-like accessory above. The design merges human form with futuristic, mechanical elements.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bald head, armored torso, utility belt, and the full frontal detail of the exoskeleton, with the cape-like accessory and helmeted headpiece above.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head, the layered armor on the limbs, and the depth of the cape-like structure above.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the armor, the attachment points for the cape-like accessory, and the full expanse of the winged structure.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side profile of the armor and the suspended accessory above.
attribute_clothing_type: futuristic armored bodysuit with utility belt and mechanical accessories
